message:
🌱 Update button UX: spin animation, repo name, keep popover open (#172)

- Refresh icon spins 1 full turn on click
- 'Up to date' now says 'Up to date with kubestellar/copilot-remote'
- Re-check keeps popover open and shows checking state

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
